title: Add user sign-up and authentication with Internet Identity

requirements.summary: Integrate Internet Identity authentication to allow users to sign up and log in securely using passkey-based authentication
acceptanceCriteria: Users can click a sign-up/login button to authenticate with Internet Identity
Authentication state is persisted across browser sessions
The UI displays the user's authenticated status (logged in vs anonymous)
Users can log out from their account

file_operations.description: Add authentication UI controls to the header displaying login/logout button based on authentication state from useInternetIdentity hook, showing user principal when authenticated
Create reusable authentication button component that conditionally renders login or logout button with loading states, using useInternetIdentity hook for authentication actions

requirements.summary: Create a user profile or history page where authenticated users can view their past quiz results and track their mental wellness journey over time
acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated users can navigate to a profile/history page
The page displays a list of previous quiz attempts with dates and scores
Users can see their progress trends over time
The page maintains the warm, supportive design theme

file_operations.description: Create profile page component that fetches user's quiz history using getMyAttempts backend function, displays attempts with timestamps and scores in a supportive card layout with warm theme styling, shows empty state for users with no history
Add useMyAttempts React Query hook that fetches authenticated user's quiz history by calling getMyAttempts backend function, with proper cache management and authentication state dependency
Register new /profile route in TanStack Router configuration that renders ProfilePage component with authentication guard to ensure only logged-in users can access
Add navigation link to profile page in header that is only visible when user is authenticated, positioned alongside existing navigation elements
Create reusable card component for displaying individual quiz attempt with formatted timestamp, score percentage, supportive feedback based on score level, maintaining warm wellness theme

requirements.summary: Update the quiz submission flow to use the authenticated actor when users are logged in, ensuring their results are saved to their account
acceptanceCriteria: When authenticated, quiz submissions are sent through the authenticated actor
Results are stored with the user's Principal in the backend
Anonymous users continue to use localStorage for temporary results
The results page reflects whether results are saved to an account or are temporary

file_operations.description: Update quiz submission logic to check authentication state from useInternetIdentity hook and call submitAnswers backend function when authenticated, while maintaining localStorage fallback for anonymous users
Update results page to display authentication-aware messaging indicating whether results are saved to account or temporary in localStorage, with call-to-action to sign up for anonymous users
Update useSubmitAnswers mutation hook to accept authentication state parameter and conditionally submit to backend when authenticated, including proper cache invalidation for user attempts
